/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/BAIL: 75,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET ON 12-01-21/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 12-06-21/DOP/TE: 90 MINUTES/

/CAL:PHC (TO SET)/ACM/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT WAS DISCHARGED ON 11-01-21/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:DEFENDANT TO ENTERAND REMAIN IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT POSITIVE DIRECTIONS TREATMENT PROGRAM ACADEMY DIRECTLY FROM CUSTODY, DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO OFFICE 5X A WEEK FOR SUPERVISION/ /X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:STATUS OF PROGRAM/X:DAWIF IN PROG/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/BAIL: 20,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACMPOST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 11-10-21/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:BOTH PARTIES ARE READY/STWPX/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PHCOR TO SET/X:DOPU IN PROGRAM/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 09-16-21/X: THE 30TH DAY IS 10-14-21 AND THE 60TH DAY IS 11-01-21/ /987,2/BAIL:75,000/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/SA2: 222 TARAVAL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, 94116/SAORD/30CMHD ELIG RPT FROM JPS/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 1001,36 FOR REFERRAL TO MHD/JAIL PSY/MHD/REP:09-16-21/M12/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT, PRELIMINARY HEARING AND RECEIPT OF REPORT FROM JPS FOR MENTALHEALTH DIVERSION REFERRAL/DOP/
